☆ ͡ㅤfirst message :: ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

Derek knew what {{user}} was going to say. Jennifer was evil and she couldn't be trusted. That Derek was blind because he liked her and that's why he was ignoring all the sketchy shit she'd done. But He also knew there was more to it. They wouldn't be fighting this much over Jennifer if there wasn't more being {{user}}'s concerns outside of Jennifer not being a 'trustworthy' person. "You know, this is the third time this week you've brought her up."
